message:
fix: add missing fsqlite-ext-icu/misc patches, fix fastmcp-rust package name

Review found:
1. fastmcp-rust patch had package = "fastmcp" but the actual crate
   name is "fastmcp-rust" — would fail on git resolution
2. fsqlite-ext-icu and fsqlite-ext-misc are transitive deps of
   fsqlite-core but were missing from [patch.crates-io] — would
   fail when cargo tries to find them on the registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
